title: Different Definitions of Love
summary: Chapter 22 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled Different Definitions of Love. Theme: Love means staying to him, freedom to her.
sceneDescription: Different definitions of love become a split composition: staying, freedom, and two honest directions.
